title: pogonospermum cubangense
intro: Pogonospermum cubangense is a plant species that belongs to the family Rutaceae, commonly known as the citrus family. It is native to Vietnam and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The plant's leaves and roots are rich in flavonoids and terpenoids, which have been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, contributing to its health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating cough. Pogonospermum cubangense is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is also used in traditional Vietnamese medicine to treat various ailments.
